CC 2.1.140 upstream snapshot

Auto-generated by claude-release-watch.yml daily cron. Captures upstream anthropics/claude-code CHANGELOG for triage. No runtime behaviour changes ship in this PR.

Contents

  • shared/cc-snapshots/<version>.md — verbatim CHANGELOG entry
  • shared/cc-adoption-gaps.json — gap report for milestone planning
  • shared/gh-issue-args.json — pre-filled gh issue create args

This playground page exists to satisfy the M119 PR Playground gate. The gate currently does not recognize the orchestkit-release-bot author or chore/cc-snapshot-* branch prefix as bot-generated — separate small PR will add them to the allowlist so future cron PRs skip the gate automatically.
